---
title: "Font Filtering Fallback Test"
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          # When ALL fonts are unavailable, fallback preserves the original list
          - 'font: \("FakeFont Alpha", "FakeFont Beta"\),'
          - 'codefont: \("FakeMonoFont One", "FakeMonoFont Two"\),'
        - []
---

Verifies that when every font in a comma list is unavailable, the original
unfiltered list is preserved as fallback rather than producing an empty tuple.
